title: 3C Carrot or Stick? — Убеждение и мотивация

items.example: She used persuasion to get them to agree.
Money is not the only form of motivation.
He got what he wanted through manipulation.
They put pressure on us to accept the deal.
After some coaxing, she agreed to come.
She has the drive to succeed.
Can you persuade him to join us?
A good leader knows how to motivate people.
The bonus is a great incentive to work harder.
